title: pelargonium alternans subsp. alternans
intro: Pelargonium alternans subsp. alternans, a species of the Geraniaceae family, is a flowering plant commonly known as the Cape Geranium. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium alternans subsp. alternans include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
